hero.title: GHG, Regenerative Agriculture and Carbon Capture Projects RS Gold Unit
hero.subtitle: Nescafé Responsible Sourced Gold
hero.description: Guarantees the RS Gold supply chain responsible coffee under regenerative and resilient agriculture. 1,620 coffee growers moving toward certified sustainability.

coverage.title: Departments of influence
coverage.description: The program operates in the main coffee-growing departments of Honduras, covering 1,620 producing families integrated into the RS GOLD chain.

c4.title: 4C Certification
c4.desc: Common Code for the Coffee Community — baseline sustainability standard for responsible coffee growing.

regenerative.title: Regenerative Agriculture
regenerative.desc: Practices that restore soil health, increase biodiversity and reduce 17,152 TCO₂e of emissions.

trace.title: Full traceability
trace.desc: 1,620 georeferenced farms to guarantee total transparency in Nestlé's supply chain.

items.nutricional: Nutritional management based on soil analysis

mlt.title: MLT Varieties
mlt.description: The Coffee Variety Evaluation Project — Multi-Location Trials — is a joint effort between Nestlé and Fundación COHONDUCAFÉ to generate reliable information on new coffee hybrids under real production conditions in Honduras.

objectives.crecimiento: Characterize the vegetative growth of the materials
objectives.respuesta: Record productive response throughout the cycle
objectives.adaptacion: Analyze adaptation and stability according to altitude

regenerative.title: Regenerative Agriculture
regenerative.desc: Soil restoration, biodiversity and reduction of carbon emissions.

trace.title: Traceability
trace.desc: 1,620 georeferenced farms with full transparency in the chain.

incentives.title: Conditional incentives
incentives.desc: Rewards compliance with good agricultural practices and 4C.

risk.title: Risk assessment
risk.desc: Child labor, human rights and social inclusion audited.
